name: Identity
description: Identity API contains information about creator's account identity and profile info from a connected creator platform.

cells.fldeJ92et6mXwGuts:
Username of the connected account. This is used to uniquely identify a user on any platform and usually the name that is present in the URLs, used to tag a user etc.

Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name in the URL and for Instagram / Twitter / TikTok etc, it's the handle.
Full name of the user profile.
First name of the user profile.
Last name of the user profile.
Nickname of the user profile.
Profile URL on the connected platform.

Description of the profile.

Ex - For Instagram it's the bio and for YouTube it's the channel introduction.
URL of the profile image on the platform.
Date of birth of the user on the platform.
Unique identifier of the profile on the platform.
Account type of the user on the platform.

Category of the user's platform account.

Ex - For Instagram it's the page type which could be beauty, fitness etc
User website listed on the platform.
Total number of followers of this profile.
Total number of profiles this profile is following.
Total number of subscribers.
Total number of content items (videos, images, posts etc).
Total number of content group items (playlists, albums, collections etc).
Total watch time in hours.
Type of the email ID. - WORK | OTHER | HOME
Email ID of the user.
Type of the phone number.
Phone number of the user.
Type of the address. - WORK | OTHER | HOME
Address of the user.
Country of the user on the connected platform.
Gender of the user.

User's profile name on the work platform. This is not unique, is displayed prominently on the profile, usually editable and is most commonly associated with that user's identity on the platform.

Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name displayed on the channel page and for Instagram / Twitter / TikTok etc, it's the name displayed on the user's profile page.

Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube it's the channel ID and for Instagram it's the Instagram page ID.
Timestamp when the profile was created on the platform.
true if the user's profile is verified by the platform.
true if the user's profile is business account on the platform.
Total number of connections of this profile.
Work experiences listed on the profile
Total number of paid subscribers.
The historical average open rate of the publication as percentage.
The historical average clickthrough rate of the publication as percentage.
Total number of likes count
Education listed on the profile
Publications listed on the profile
Certifications listed on the profile
Volunteering experiences listed on the profile
List of honors listed on the profile
List of projects listed on the profile

name: Audience
description: Demographics API contains details about a creators audience including aggregated data for audience countries, cities and gender_age_split.

cells.fldWxT75nl0fTpHOe: Percentage value of demographics from the corresponding country
Percentage value of demographics from the corresponding city
Percentage value of demographics from the corresponding gender in the corresponding age range

name: Engagement
description: Engagement API contains information about creator's work, content, and engagement metrics on the content from a connected work platform.

columns.name: YouTube
columns.description: Media types supported - Videos, Shorts and Playlists

columns.name: Instagram
columns.description: Media types supported: Posts (images, videos), Reels, Stories, Carousel Albums - Refer here: https://airtable.com/shrySBANO9LhVT7bG

columns.name: Twitter
columns.description: Media types supported: Tweets, Retweets, Threads

columns.name: Facebook
columns.description: Media type supported: Posts, Videos, Albums

cells.fld1vaU67TlWFb8r0: Title of the content item.
Media type of the content item. - VIDEO | IMAGE | AUDIO | TEXT | OTHER
Platform specific content type. - VIDEO | POST | STORY | TWEET | BLOG | IMAGE | THREAD | PODCAST | TRACK | REELS | STREAM | FEED | IGTV
Platform permanent content URL

Direct media URL of the content item, which can be used to download the media item. This is usually a signed URL and may have certain expiry limits so we recommend using it for downloads as soon as possible (such as when a webhook is received), if you are looking to cache media files with you.)
Description of the content item.

Thumbnail URL of the content item, which can be used to download the media thumbnail. This is usually a signed URL and may have certain expiry limits so we recommend using it for downloads as soon as possible (such as when a webhook is received), if you are looking to cache thumbnails with you.
Publishing timestamp of the content item.

Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube it's the channel ID and for Instagram it's the Instagram page ID.

User's profile name on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name and for Instagram it's the Instagram handle.
Total likes.
Total dislikes.
Total organic impressions.
Total organic reach.
Total item saves.
Total views.
If format is video - total watch time in hours.
Total shares.
Total paid impressions.
Total paid reach.
Unique content ID on the platform.
Indicates if the content item is sponsored.
Sponsor tag (can include mentions of the sponsor)
Indicates if the content item has collaborators.

true, if the content is owned by the creator. In YouTube, it is possible that content is actually owned by another creator, but current creator has linked that content in their playlist. In such a case the content will still be listed for the current creator.
Total comments.
Video duration in seconds (only available for YouTube).
Array of hashtags used in the media description
Array of mentioned accounts in the media
Average watch time of reel in seconds
A stable, long-lived URL to the media thumbnail cached on our servers. Since the original "thumbnail_url" provided by the platform has an expiry limit.
Visibility of a content item. Values can be PRIVATE | UNLISTED | PUBLIC

name: Comments
description: Comments API contains information about the audience of a creators content in the form of comments and commenters.

cells.fldbTh9TTvsEc6uel: Full display name of the commenter profile.
Unique identifier of the commenter's profile on the platform.
Commenter's profile URL on the connected platform.
Unique comment ID on the platform.
Unique ID of the content item.
Content's published date and time on the platform.

name: Income - Social - Transactions
description: Transactions records for ad and subscription income from social platforms.

cells.fldtze7d6yIEE0NZb:
User's profile name on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name and for Instagram it's the Instagram handle.

Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube it's the channel ID and for Instagram it's the Instagram page ID.

cells.fldD7LsIxziAw4i2G: Payout status - SCHEDULED, PAID, IN_TRANSIT, CANCELLED, OTHER
Payout interval - AUTOMATIC_DAILY, AUTOMATIC_MONTHLY, AUTOMATIC_WEEKLY, MANUAL, OTHER

Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube it's the channel ID and for Instagram it's the Instagram page ID.

User's profile name on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name and for Instagram it's the Instagram handle.

cells.fld4yY9I2NoYd9V3Z:
Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube it's the channel ID and for Instagram it's the Instagram page ID.

User's profile name on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name and for Instagram it's the Instagram handle.

cells.fldRdnmRBkfE0IwyQ: Transaction type - SALE, REFUND, VOID, CANCELLED, OTHER
Transaction status - SUCCESS, FAILURE, PENDING, OTHER

Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube it's the channel ID and for Instagram it's the Instagram page ID.

User's profile name on the work platform.

Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name and for Instagram it's the Instagram handle.

cells.fld4Nxj9RnUYTb4hO: Payout status - SCHEDULED, PAID, IN_TRANSIT, CANCELLED, OTHER
Payout interval - AUTOMATIC_DAILY, AUTOMATIC_MONTHLY, AUTOMATIC_WEEKLY, MANUAL, OTHER

Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform.

name: Publish
description: Publish new content to creators' accounts on supported work platforms.

cells.fldTn6XEKkIQUnVzf: Description for the post being published.
Platform specific content type of the post being published : TWEET | REELS | STORY | VIDEO | IMAGE | BLOG | THREAD | POST | PODCAST | TRACK | STREAM | FEED | SHORTS

Visibility of the post : PUBLIC| PRIVATE
| UNLISTED
Whether we should retry posting the content in case of any technical failures.
Mandatory for Instagram. Whether you want to share the video only to Reels section or Reels + Feed section.
Media type of the media item being published: IMAGE | VIDEO
Publicly accessible URL for the media to be uploaded.
Publicly accessible image URL to be used as the thumbnail to be uploaded.
Time offset in milliseconds within the video for the frame that should be used as the thumbnail (Instagram only).

name: Activity
description: Fetch users' activity info from supported work platforms. Activity attributes provided include top played artists, recently played media content, top played media content, etc. via the work platform.

cells.fldwJcrNz9e8tpMBW: Unique ID of the artist on the platform
Image URL of the artist on the platform
URL of the artist on the platform
Type of the artist. FOLLOWED | TOP
Unique content ID on the platform

Media type of the content item. 
Allowed values: VIDEO | IMAGE | AUDIO | TEXT | OTHER.
Platform specific content type. - VIDEO | POST | STORY | TWEET | BLOG | IMAGE | THREAD | PODCAST | TRACK | REELS | STREAM | FEED | IGTV
Thumbnail URL of the content item
Embed URL of the content item
Type of the content item.  RECENT | TOP | SAVED
Album that the track belongs to
